text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where am I? I was on school<n>grounds until
just a second ago...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, looks like I have the place to<n>myself. This is
a good chance for me<n>to run some experiments
without any<n>restraints.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Tachyon?! I am so sorry to<n>intrude, but... I'm
actually here as<n>well!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What's this? My instruments are<n>picking up an
unusual amount of<n>static electricity... However, as
far as I<n>know, there are no organisms in the
vicinity capable of causing<n>interference.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... Tachyooon? Wait... Can you<n>not see me?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You're just messing around, right?Uh, w-wait wait!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I d-dunno what's going on exactly,<n>but does this
mean I can spy on my<n>oshis with no risk of getting
in the<n>way?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh my freakin' GOSH! I need to go<n>right now! I
need to hurry and get oshi<n>watching like now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! This is something else! My<n>legs feel so
light—like I'm floating!<n>Woohoo! I'm running
through the<n>sky!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I've danced myselfout! This flame... It's like my heart isburning my muscles with the blazingheat of hell—oxygen and fat alight all around me!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! They really can't see me! I<n>can't
believe I'm actually not<n>bothering them!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
La la la! ♪ Drink and be drank! ♪<n>Teary
Umamusume! ♪ Running North,<n>la la la! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Kekeke. Humming to herself in the<n>classroom after
school! And it's so<n>cuuute she doesn't know all
the<n>words! Oh, we've got a winner!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeeees! This is the absolute best!<n>Now, who
should I spy on nex—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyagh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... Trainer? What the heck are<n>you doing
here?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, that's right... The Uma I passed<n>by was so
cute I lost control of my<n>breathing, and...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(N-no way... Was she so divine that I<n>passed out
and... had an out-of-body<n>experience?!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (Sigh... Wow! That was theabsolute coolest.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(And I still remember how it felt<n>running through
the sky... Oh! Actually,<n>I think I can put that to use
in a race!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Don't worry, I'm fine. But... get<n>ready to
see something awesome<n>next race!
